changelog:
New！OpenClaw(Mini) —not a crippled CLI port, but OpenClaw's practical core rebuilt for Android. Tool calling, session handling, heartbeat isolation, skills, device control, browser actions, UI inspection, screenshots, automation, file handling, diagnostics, scheduled tasks, plus QQ and Telegram channels. All in a lightweight form that actually lives inside Ava. Find it at Settings → Advanced → Mod Store → OpenClaw(Mini).

Heartbeat system added—isolated background checks that never pollute main chat context. Root, Shizuku, safe adb/shell commands, file reading, system inspection, app UI access all supported. **Full accessibility integration** for non-root devices—UI inspection, control reading, screenshot analysis triggered only when tools need it, never heavy always-on.

Fixed #52: new **Stop Alarm** action, full alarm flow reworked, custom alarm sounds finally supported. Thanks @yaro24. **Browser gesture navigation** rebuilt for floating window WebView—no more overlay gesture conflicts. **Live browser URL sync**—frontend sees current address in real time. **Intent:// links** fixed—routed to Android, not misrouted through browser. **Large-screen scaling** fixed—9-inch+ tablets no longer stuck in compressed phone layout; home screen title, controls, status scale properly. ESPHome version now visible. Entity display, config pollution, state reporting, screenshot workflows, messaging channels, compilation and runtime issues all patched.
